---
{{yml}}
---

::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# {{title}}

### {{time}}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block style="min-width: 640px; max-width:1080px; margin: 20px auto"}

{{abstract}}

{{#speakers}}
::: speaker

:::{.speaker-header}
![]({{avatar_url}}) 
:::

:::{.speaker-name}
{{name}}
:::

:::{.speaker-bio}
{{biography}}
:::

:::

{{/speakers}}


:::


```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
display: none !important;
}
</style>
```
